items.name: Burrata e Pèsca
items.desc: Peach burrata salad, fresh basil, extra virgin olive oil, fresh cracked pepper, baby heirloom tomato salad.

items.name: Gamberoni all’Aglio
items.desc: Jumbo garlic shrimp, Calabrian chili, toasted garlic, white wine, butter and grilled bread.

items.name: Carpaccio di Manzo
items.desc: Thinly sliced raw beef tenderloin, arugula, shaved Parmesan, capers, lemon, extra virgin olive oil.

items.name: Vongole in Bianco
items.desc: Manila clams steamed with white wine, garlic, parsley, Calabrian chili, grilled bread.

items.name: Dentice
items.desc: Pan-seared Hawaiian blue snapper (uku), sweet corn and crab risotto, lemon butter sauce.

items.name: Linguine al Limone
items.desc: Homemade linguine tossed with fresh lemon juice, butter, Parmesan cheese and basil.

items.name: Bistecca alla Fiorentina
items.desc: Grilled bone-in ribeye, rosemary, lemon, olive oil, roasted potatoes, charred broccolini.

items.name: Osso Buco
items.desc: Slow-braised veal shank, saffron risotto Milanese, gremolata.

rows.headline: $26 for 26 Years
rows.detail: Two courses for $26 — salad or soup, then a fresh pasta of your choice.

rows.headline: Tuesday at the Bar
rows.detail: $5 house wines and $10 premium wines, 4:30–6:30 in the bar and patio.

rows.headline: Wine Lovers Wednesday
rows.detail: 25% off all bottles of wine — and we mean all of them.

policy_line: Sorry, no split orders.  ·  Standard gratuity 22% for parties of 6 or more.
